entities.description: A specific subset of chickpea accessions used for genetic study.

entities.description: The differences in DNA sequences among individuals in the collection.

entities.name: SSR MARKERS
entities.description: Simple sequence repeat markers used for molecular identification.

entities.name: MOLECULAR DIVERSITY
entities.description: The variety of genetic characteristics within the core collection.

entities.description: The degree of kinship or similarity between the accessions.

entities.description: A measure of the proportion of alleles shared between accessions.

entities.description: A model-based method used to determine population structure.
